tex:

\newline
The table shows the results.
\newline

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
Number of cinema visits & 0 & 1 & 2 & 3 & 4 & 5 & 6 & 7 \\
\hline
Frequency & 5 & 5 & 6 & 6 & 7 & 3 & 6 & 2 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}

(a) (i) (b) Find the mode.
\newline

(c) Calculate the mean.
\newline
